---
title: "Statistics for Synthesis"
---

## Overview

{{< fa person-digging >}} Under Construction

:::{.callout-note icon="false" collapse="false"}
### {{< fa file-pen >}} Pre-Class Preparation

- Your group should be ready to give a short (15 minute) presentation on your proposed analyses
- You should be ready to discuss feedback with the rest of the class

:::

{{< include topics/stats-presentations.qmd >}}

---

{{< include topics/stats-hypotheses.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/stats-mixed-effects.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/stats-aic.qmd >}}

{{< include topics/stats-meta.qmd >}}
